title: Kathol (disambiguation)
content:
'''Kathol''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*[[Kathol sector]], a location in the [[Outer Rim Territories]]
*[[Kathol Rift]], a region of [[Realspace|space]]

==Legends==
*[[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]], a location in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]
**[[Kathol Republic]], the government of most of the sector
***[[Kathol system/Legends|Kathol system]], formerly the central system of the Republic
****[[Kathol (planet)|Kathol]], the inhabited planet of the Kathol system
*****[[Kathol (species)|Kathol]], the sentient species that gave their name to all of the above
**[[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]], an area of difficult navigation within Kathol sector
**[[KatholNet]], the [[NewsNet]] that served the sector
*''[[Kathol Protector]]'', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] stationed in Kathol sector

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|fi=Kathol
}}
